# Eahtasham Ummam

Software Engineer & AI Automation Builder. Pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science at University of Calcutta. Building elegant experiences for the web, specializing in full-stack applications, AI tools, and workflow automations.

## Core Skills
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, Shadcn
- **Backend & DB**: Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firebase, Java (MVC/Servlets)
- **Languages**: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C++, Python
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, Vercel, GitHub Actions, Netlify
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, IoT (Raspberry Pi, OpenCV)

## Professional Experience

### Connect2Learn (Remote)
**Software Engineer** (June 2026 – Present)
- Building and scaling the core learning platform end-to-end.
- Owning full-stack feature delivery, driving performance, reliability, and DX improvements.
- Tech Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, MySQL.

**Software Engineer Intern** (March 2026 – June 2026)
- Built reusable, accessible UI components and integrated REST APIs.
- Tech Stack: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS.

### Textify AI (Remote)
**Full Stack Developer Intern** (July 2025 – April 2026)
- Extended the analytics platform across both frontend and backend.
- Implemented Firebase Authentication and built chart customization features.
- Tech Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Firebase, TailwindCSS.

**Frontend Developer Intern** (Feb 2025 – June 2025)
- Redesigned and optimized the analytics website, improving page load time by 30%.
- Tech Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS.

### Indian Leather Technologists' Association (Kolkata, India)
**Java Developer Intern** (July 2025 – Oct 2025)
- Developed Java REST APIs, database integrations, and supported data workflows.
- Tech Stack: Java, MySQL, JavaScript.

### Indian Council of Medical Research (Kolkata, India)
**Java Developer Intern** (Jan 2025 – June 2025)
- Developed dynamic web pages, patient detail APIs, and mental health tools for medical professionals.
- Tech Stack: Java, Servlets, HTML5, CSS3, MySQL, jQuery.

## Projects

### OneScript
- **Description**: AI-powered SaaS chatbot that learns from website content to answer customer questions, capture leads, and provide 24/7 support.
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, TailwindCSS, PostgreSQL, Gemini
- **Link**: https://onescript.xyz
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/eahtasham

### Samvidhaan
- **Description**: AI-powered legal assistant focused on Indian laws. Supports semantic search, case law retrieval, and contextual responses using RAG.
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, TailwindCSS, Python, OpenAI
- **Link**: https://www.samvidhaan.live/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/Eahtasham/AI-Lawyer-Frontend

### AI Mock Interview Platform (PrepWise)
- **Description**: Interactive AI mock interview platform featuring a real-time code editor, voice agent, and analytics dashboard.
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, TailwindCSS, Clerk, Gemini, PostgreSQL
- **Link**: https://prep-wise.netlify.app/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/Eahtasham/PrepWise

### SchoolSync
- **Description**: Full-stack school management platform featuring role-based access control (RBAC), schedules, announcements, and parent-teacher communication.
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, Shadcn, Prisma, PostgreSQL, TailwindCSS
- **Link**: https://schoolsyncdev.vercel.app/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/Eahtasham/SchoolSync

### ChatWithPDF
- **Description**: Interact with PDF documents via AI chat, with support for text chunking, embeddings, and semantic query parsing.
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, RAG, Embeddings, OpenAI
- **Link**: https://github.com/Eahtasham/ChatWithPDF

### CU Dept. Management System
- **Description**: NAAC-compliant education management system featuring student records, attendance tracking, and database-driven workflows.
- **Tech Stack**: Java, Servlets, JSP, MySQL, JavaScript
- **Link**: https://cucse.itech4all.in/

### AI Face Recognition Door Lock
- **Description**: Face-recognition smart lock system using Raspberry Pi and OpenCV, designed for low-power security automation.
- **Tech Stack**: Python, OpenCV, IoT, Raspberry Pi, React Native
- **Link**: https://github.com/Eahtasham/iot-lock-app
